fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RCV_OFF
fields.description: analog part of the receiver is switched off

fields.name: POWER_DOWN
fields.description: Soft power-down mode entered

fields.name: COMMAND
fields.description: activates a command based on the Command value

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: T_STOP_NOW
fields.description: timer stops immediately

fields.name: T_START_NOW
fields.description: timer starts immediately

fields.name: RX_LAST_BITS
fields.description: indicates the number of valid bits in the last received byte

Interrupt Management.name: COM_IEN_REG
Interrupt Management.description: Control bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests

fields.name: IRQ_INV
fields.description: signal on pin IRQ is inverted with respect to the Status1Reg register's IRq bit

fields.name: TX_IEN
fields.description: allows the transmitter interrupt request (TxIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: RX_IEN
fields.description: allows the receiver interrupt request (RxIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: IDLE_IEN
fields.description: allows the idle interrupt request (IdleIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IEN
fields.description: allows the high alert interrupt request (HiAlertIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IEN
fields.description: allows the low alert interrupt request (LoAlertIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: ERR_IEN
fields.description: allows the error interrupt request (ErrIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: TIMER_IEN
fields.description: allows the timer interrupt request (TimerIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: RSVD_1_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_6_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: IRQPUSHPULL
fields.description: IRQ pin is CMOS output

fields.name: MFINACTIEN
fields.description: MFIN active interrupt enable

fields.name: CRCIEN
fields.description: CRC interrupt enable

Interrupt Management.name: ComIrqReg
Interrupt Management.description: Interrupt request bits. All bits are cleared by software

fields.name: SET1
fields.description: indicates that the marked bits in the ComIrqReg register are set

fields.name: TX_IRQ
fields.description: set immediately after the last bit of the transmitted data was sent out

fields.name: RX_IRQ
fields.description: receiver has detected the end of a valid data stream

fields.name: IDLE_IRQ
fields.description: If a command terminates, for example, when the CommandReg changes its value from any command to the Idle command

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: the Status1Reg register's HiAlert bit is set in opposition to the HiAlert bit

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Status1Reg register's LoAlert bit is set in opposition to the LoAlert bit

fields.name: ERR_IRQ
fields.description: any error bit in the ErrorReg register is set

fields.name: TIMER_IRQ
fields.description: the timer decrements the timer value in register TCounterValReg to zero

fields.name: RESERVED_
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: RESERVED_3
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: RESERVED_1_0
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: SET2
fields.description: Set1 indicates that the marked bits in the ComIrqReg register are cleared

fields.name: RFT
fields.description: RFT - These register bits are reserved for future use or are for

fields.name: MFINACTIRQ
fields.description: MFIN active interrupt

fields.name: CRCIRQ
fields.description: CRC interrupt request

Status Registers.name: ErrorReg
Status Registers.description: Error bit register showing the error status of the last command executed

fields.name: RSVD_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: WR_ERR
fields.description: data is written into the FIFO buffer by the host during the MFAuthent command

fields.name: TEMP_ERR
fields.description: internal temperature sensor detects overheating

fields.name: BUFFER_OVFL
fields.description: the host or a MFRC522's internal state machine tries to write data to the FIFO buffer even though it is already full

fields.name: COLL_ERR
fields.description: a bit-collision is detected

fields.name: CRC_ERR
fields.description: the RxModeReg register's RxCRCEn bit is set and the CRC calculation fails

fields.name: PARITY_ERR
fields.description: parity check failed

fields.name: PROTOCOL_ERR
fields.description: set to logic 1 if the SOF is incorrect

Status Registers.name: Status1Reg
Status Registers.description: Status1 register with interrupt and FIFO status bits

fields.name: RESERVED_7
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_2
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: CRCOK
fields.description: CRC result is zero for data transmission and reception

fields.name: CRCREADY
fields.description: CRC calculation has finished

fields.name: IRQ
fields.description: interrupt source requests attention

fields.name: TRUNNING
fields.description: MFRC522's timer unit is running

fields.name: HIALERT
fields.description: FIFO high water level alert

fields.name: LOALERT
fields.description: FIFO low water level alert

Status Registers.name: Status2Reg
Status Registers.description: Contains status bits of the receiver, transmitter and data mode detector.

fields.name: RSVD_5_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: TempSensClear
fields.description: Temp sens clear

fields.name: I2CForceHS
fields.description: I2 cforce HS

fields.name: MFCrypto1On
fields.description: Mfcrypto1 on

fields.name: ModemState
fields.description: Modem state

FIFO Management.name: FIFODataReg
FIFO Management.description: Input and output of 64 byte FIFO buffer

fields.name: FIFO_DATA
fields.description: FIFO buffer input/output data

FIFO Management.name: FIFOLevelReg
FIFO Management.description: Indicates the number of bytes stored in the FIFO

fields.name: FIFO_LEVEL
fields.description: Number of bytes stored in FIFO buffer

fields.name: FLUSH_BUFFER
fields.description: Reset FIFO buffer pointers

FIFO Management.name: WaterLevelReg
FIFO Management.description: Defines the level for FIFO under- and overflow warning

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: WATER_LEVEL
fields.description: defines a warning level to indicate a FIFO buffer overflow or underflow

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: START_SEND
fields.description: starts the transmission of data only valid in combination with the Transceive command

fields.name: RX_ALIGN
fields.description: used for reception of bit-oriented frames: defines the bit position for the first bit received to be stored in the FIFO buffer

fields.name: TX_LAST_BITS
fields.description: used for transmission of bit oriented frames: defines the number of bits of the last byte that will be transmitted 000b indicates that all bits of the last byte will be transmitted

Bit Framing and Collision.name: CollReg
Bit Framing and Collision.description: Defines the first bit-collision detected on the RF interface

fields.name: RSVD_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: VALUES_AFTER_COLL
fields.description: all received bits will be cleared after a collision only used during bitwise anticollision at 106 kBd, otherwise it is set to logic 1

fields.name: COLL_POS_NOT_VALID
fields.description: no collision detected or the position of the collision is out of the range of CollPos[4:0]

fields.name: COLL_POS
fields.description: shows the bit position of the first detected collision in a received frame only data bits are interpreted

TX Configuration.name: TxModeReg
TX Configuration.description: Defines the data rate during transmission

fields.name: RESERVED_2_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: TX_CRC_EN
fields.description: enables CRC generation during data transmission

fields.name: TX_SPEED
fields.description: defines the bit rate during data transmission

fields.name: INV_MOD
fields.description: modulation of transmitted data is inverted

TX Configuration.name: TxControlReg
TX Configuration.description: Controls the logical behavior of the antenna driver pins TX1 and TX2

fields.name: RSVD_2
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: INV_TX2_RF_ON
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 inverted when driver TX2 is enabled

fields.name: INV_TX1_RF_ON
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 inverted when driver TX1 is enabled

fields.name: INV_TX2_RF_OFF
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 inverted when driver TX2 is disabled

fields.name: INV_TX1_RF_OFF
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 inverted when driver TX1 is disabled

fields.name: TX2_CW
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 continuously delivers the unmodulated 13.56 MHz energy carrier

fields.name: TX2_RF_EN
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 delivers the 13.56 MHz energy carrier modulated by the transmission data

fields.name: TX1_RF_EN
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 delivers the 13.56 MHz energy carrier modulated by the transmission data

fields.name: RESERVED_7
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_5_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: FORCE_100_ASK
fields.description: forces a 100 %ASK modulation independent of the ModGsPReg register setting

TX Configuration.name: TxSelReg
TX Configuration.description: TX driver and MFOUT pin selection register

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: DRIVER_SEL
fields.description: selects the input of drivers TX1 and TX2

fields.name: MFOUT_SEL
fields.description: selects the input for pin MFOUT

TX Configuration.name: MfTxReg
TX Configuration.description: Controls some MIFARE communication transmit parameters

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use or for production tests and must not be changed

fields.name: TX_WAIT
fields.description: defines the additional response time 7 bits are added to the value of the register bit by default

RX Configuration.name: RxModeReg
RX Configuration.description: Defines the data rate during reception

fields.name: RESERVED_1_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RX_CRC_EN
fields.description: enables the CRC calculation during reception

fields.name: RX_SPEED
fields.description: defines the bit rate while receiving data

fields.name: RX_NO_ERR
fields.description: an invalid received data stream will be ignored and the receiver remains active

fields.name: RX_MULTIPLE
fields.description: able to receive more than one data frame

fields.name: UART_SEL
fields.description: selects the input of the contactless UART

fields.name: RX_WAIT
fields.description: after data transmission the activation of the receiver is delayed for RxWait bit-clocks

RX Configuration.name: RxThresholdReg
RX Configuration.description: Selects thresholds for the bit decoder

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: MIN_LEVEL
fields.description: defines the minimum signal strength at the decoder input that will be accepted if the signal strength is below this level it is not evaluated

fields.name: COLL_LEVEL
fields.description: defines the minimum signal strength at the decoder input that must be reached by the weaker half-bit of the Manchester encoded signal to generate a bit-collision relative to the amplitude of the stronger half-bit

fields.name: ADD_IQ
fields.description: defines the use of I and Q channel during reception Remark: the FixIQ bit must be set to logic 0 to enable the following settings

fields.name: FIX_IQ
fields.description: if AddIQ[1:0] are set to X0b, the reception is fixed to I channel if AddIQ[1:0] are set to X1b, the reception is fixed to Q channel

fields.name: TPRESCAL_EVEN
fields.description: Available on RC522 version 1.0 and version 2.0: If set to logic 0 the following formula is used to calculate the timer frequency of the prescaler: f_timer = 13.56 MHz / (2*TPreScaler+1). Only available on version 2.0: If set to logic 1 the following formula is used to calculate the timer frequency of the prescaler: f_timer = 13.56 MHz / (2*TPreScaler+2). Default TPrescalEven bit is logic 0, find more information on the prescaler in Section 8.5.

fields.name: TAU_RCV
fields.description: changes the time-constant of the internal PLL during data reception Remark: if set to 00b the PLL is frozen during data reception

fields.name: TAU_SYNC
fields.description: changes the time-constant of the internal PLL during burst

fields.name: RESERVED_7_5
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_3_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: PARITY_DISABLE
fields.description: generation of the parity bit for transmission and the parity check for receiving is switched off the received parity bit is handled like a data bit

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: reserved for future use or production tests and must not be changed. In case of a write access, it is recommended to always write the value '0'.

fields.name: CRC_PRESET
fields.description: CRC preset value selection

fields.name: MSB_FIRST
fields.description: MSB first data loading

fields.name: MOD_WIDTH
fields.description: Modulation width control

fields.name: RF_CFG
fields.description: RF configuration

fields.name: GSN
fields.description: Receiver gain control

fields.name: CW_GSP
fields.description: CW generator gain

fields.name: MOD_GSP
fields.description: Modulator gain

fields.name: CRC_RESULT
fields.description: CRC result low byte

fields.name: CRC_RESULT
fields.description: CRC result high byte

fields.name: T_MODE
fields.description: Timer mode control

fields.name: T_PRESCALER
fields.description: Timer prescaler

fields.name: T_RELOAD_L
fields.description: Timer reload low byte

fields.name: T_RELOAD_H
fields.description: Timer reload high byte

fields.name: T_COUNTER_VAL_L
fields.description: Timer counter value low byte

fields.name: T_COUNTER_VAL_H
fields.description: Timer counter value high byte

fields.description: Test mode selection register 1.
